subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #078 Strikes
subcodes.first_line: You have asked about strikes. Great difficulties have arisen and will continue to arise from this issue.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از مسئله اعتصاب سؤال نمودید . در این مسئله مشکلات عظیمه حاصل شده و میشود
